title: Vogue-Style Fashion Illustration Photo Edit AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Vogue Style Identity Preserving Fashion Illustration Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image Vogue-style fashion illustration transformation for Turn this photo into a Vogue-style fashion illustration, preserving identity and facial features., preserving the uploaded identity and facial features. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure from the uploaded reference is redrawn in front-facing or slight three-quarter editorial portrait pose, keeping recognizable facial structure, hairstyle, natural age impression, and core outfit geometry. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Preserve the uploaded reference composition, face direction, body orientation, pose logic, silhouette, and visible clothing structure while simplifying the figure into an elegant fashion sketch. Signature Elements: Identity-preserving facial features, elongated fashion proportions, confident ink contour, stylized eyes and lips, expressive hair, geometric clothing simplification, clean white background, and modern luxury fashion illustration restraint. Fixed source details: Source Photo Subject: uploaded adult portrait with clear face, natural hairline, and visible upper-body outfit. Style: Vogue-style minimalist hand-drawn fashion illustration with elongated proportions, bold black ink contours, loose confident linework, flat marker colors, abstract blush accents, graphic lips, stylized eyes, expressive ink hair, and simplified geometric clothing. Color Palette: Fixed clean fashion-sketch palette with white paper ground, black ink contours, flat marker color blocks, soft blush accents, natural skin tones, and restrained editorial color. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Scanned paper texture, bold ink, flat alcohol-marker fill, sketchbook grain, clean contour edges, and refined editorial print finish. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
